title: ForceContinueConfig
description: Configuration schema for the force-continue plugin

maxContinuations.description: Maximum number of auto-continuations before hard cap

escalationThreshold.description: Number of continuations before escalation prompts begin

enableLoopDetection.description: Enable detection of response repetition loops

enableToolLoopDetection.description: Enable detection of tool call loops

nudgeDelayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before sending nudge prompts

circuitBreakerThreshold.description: Number of errors before circuit breaker trips

enableTaskTracking.description: Track background tasks associated with session

enableSystemPromptInjection.description: Inject system prompts about available tools

ignoreTools.description: Tools to ignore for loop detection and dangerous command checks

dangerousCommands.description: Legacy string patterns for dangerous command blocking

autopilotEnabled.description: Enable autonomous decision-making for guidance questions

autopilotMaxAttempts.description: Maximum autopilot attempts before falling back to user

skipNudgeInSubagents.description: Skip continuation prompts in subagent sessions
